---
title: "Patrick A. Bolger, PhD"
image: images/headShot.jpeg
toc: true
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-bolger-66b1b41/
    - text: Research Gate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Patrick_Bolger
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/patrickabolger
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:patrick.bolger@nottingham.ac.uk
---

## Currently

Patrick Bolger is a Community Development Champion in the <a href="https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/psychology/welcome-to-psychology.aspx" target="_blank">School of Psychology</a> at <a href="https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/" target="_blank">the University of Nottingham</a> in the United Kingdom. He works mostly with the team at <a href="https://opensciencetools.org/" target="_blank">Open Science Tools, Ltd.</a> (the makers of the open-source software for psychological experiments <a href="https://www.psychopy.org/" target="_blank">PsychoPy</a>, and its online sister, <a href="https://pavlovia.org/docs/home/about" target="_blank">Pavlovia</a>). He is funded by an <a href="https://chanzuckerberg.com/eoss/" target="_blank">Essential Open Source Software for Science</a> grant from the <a href="https://chanzuckerberg.com/" target="_blank">Chan Zuckerberg Initiative</a>.

---

## Educational background

PhD in Second Language Acquisition & Teaching | 2005  
University of Arizona | Tucson, Arizona

MA in Teaching of English to Speakers of Other Languages  
Monterey Institute of International Studies | Monterey, California

BS in International Business  
San Jose State University | San Jose, California
